series_metadata.series_description: Student waiver, Student Injury/Illness form, Statement of Qualifications, Direct Delivery Request, Rural Community Financial Assistance (RCFA) Application, paper copy Student Applications, Course Attendance Records, and Course Evaluations.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area two years; Upon confirmation data has been entered in database and checked quality and completeness, paper copy. ; Microform: ; Electronic: Maintain electronic data fifty years
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
